title: The Middle Realm
description: Above the nether and below the surface.
body:
Welcome to the Middle Realm, A Dimension that lies between the Overworld and the Nether.
This Dimension is made up of nothing but the Dark Oak Forests, Plains, And Lush Caves.  and most rarities such as Ruined Portals and The Dark Oak Forest rarity, The Woodland Mansion. ![Woodland Mansion in Middle Realm Dimension.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb4185ef9c15fdc86511a23cfaa26e74bd01981b_0.webp)
But of course, in order to get to this dimension, you must obtain the Gem of Neutrality that acts as the gateway to this Dimension.![Gem of Neutrality](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87fd028b43895ef9e93f1300c63734e42404d4b5.png)
A New Gem can be found in Lush Caves known as Jade, It functions slightly better than Iron but weaker than Diamond.![Jade Armor, Tools, Materials, and Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01ac9df15a3daaa43f515a1b20980c03b795948d.png)

This Mod can be used In any Modpack with Credit. Made possible with MCreator.
